title: JPS Matching Metadata
description: Structured metadata used at routing time (and embedding-input time) to improve playbook selection precision. Stored as JSON content in the Dataverse column `sprk_analysisplaybook.sprk_jps_matching_metadata` (MULTILINE TEXT). All properties are optional — additive philosophy.

documentTypes.description: Document type tags the playbook applies to. Used by WP1.5 embedding-input extension (task 032) and WP2 file-aware routing pre-filter.

intents.description: User intent labels the playbook serves. Embedding-input feature; not currently used as hard filter.

triggerPhrases.description: Free-text phrases that strongly suggest this playbook. Boosts embedding similarity; not a hard route.

preferredOver.description: List of playbook codes (PB-NNN) this playbook should be preferred over when both match. Tie-breaker for routing.

outputDestination.description: Where the playbook's output is delivered. Must align with NodeDestination values; 'both' is the post-FR-14a addition.

scopeHints.description: Tags hinting at the desired knowledge / retrieval scope (e.g. matter type, jurisdiction). Consumed by WP2 retrieval composer.

exclusionHints.description: Tags that — when present in the request context — should DEMOTE or EXCLUDE this playbook. Negative-signal complement to scopeHints.
